Localization.Description: Attempt to create or update a security policy

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} on host {event_src.host} failed to create or update security policy {object.name} with hash {object.hash.sha256}. Reason: "{reason}".
User {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} on host {event_src.host} created or updated security policy {object.name} with hash {object.hash.sha256}
